questions: What contractual cash belongs to LB from Alpha Digital and when?
How much FY2025 fee growth is recurring organic economics?
What cash reaches one fully diluted Class A-equivalent share after all claims?

responses.question: What contractual cash belongs to LB from Alpha Digital and when?
responses.answer: Primary-source reconciliation narrowed the issue but did not meet the acceptance test: No public executed Alpha Digital agreement discloses LB's net economics.

responses.question: How much FY2025 fee growth is recurring organic economics?
responses.answer: Primary-source reconciliation narrowed the issue but did not meet the acceptance test: Public disclosure does not fully separate recurring fee growth from price, mix, acquisitions, and one-time activity across a cycle.

responses.question: What cash reaches one fully diluted Class A-equivalent share after all claims?
responses.answer: Primary-source reconciliation narrowed the issue but did not meet the acceptance test: A complete per-share Up-C, NCI, tax-distribution, debt, and future-dilution waterfall remains outstanding.
